Heading: IRS Taxpayer Services
NoMatchingCardsText: No guides available for this contact type.

Summary.Heading: 💰 Refund Status Inquiry
Summary.Description: Check refund status, timelines, and IDRS codes

Detail.Heading: Refund Status Procedures
Detail.Description: Verify caller identity and check refund status in IDRS

Sections.TemplateString:
🔐 Authentication Required

  • Full SSN (last 4 not sufficient)
  • Date of Birth
  • Filing Status (Single/MFJ/MFS/HOH)
  • Exact refund amount from return

📊 IDRS Lookup Steps

  1. Access IMFOL using SSN
  2. Check for TC 846 (refund issued) or TC 840 (manual refund)
  3. Note: TC 971 AC 111 = ID Verify hold
  4. Verify account freeze indicators

⏱️ Standard Processing Times

TypeTimeline
E-file + Direct Deposit21 days
E-file + Paper Check4-6 weeks
Paper Return6-8 weeks
Amended (1040-X)16-20 weeks

🔗 Quick Links

Where's My Refund (IRS.gov)

IRM Part 21 - Customer Account Services

Detail.Heading: Identity Verification (5071C/6331C)
Detail.Description: Verify taxpayer identity for returns flagged by IRS fraud filters

Sections.TemplateString:
📧 Letter Types

LetterMeaningAction
5071CID Verify - Online/Phoneidverify.irs.gov
5747CID Verify - In PersonTAC appointment
6331CPhone Verify RequiredCall IRS directly
4883CAdditional Info NeededCall IRS

✅ Phone Verification Checklist

  • ☐ Confirm letter number and tax year
  • ☐ Verify SSN, DOB, and current address
  • ☐ Ask security questions from return
  • ☐ Confirm filing status and dependents
  • ☐ Supervisor approval required for completion

⚠️ Fraud Indicators

STOP if caller:
  • Cannot verify basic return info
  • Asks to change direct deposit info
  • Claims to be calling for someone else
  • Refuses to answer security questions

🔗 Resources

IRS Identity Verification Portal

ID.me Verification (idverify.irs.gov)

Summary.Heading: 💳 Payment Plan Setup
Summary.Description: Installment agreements for balances $50K or less

Detail.Heading: Installment Agreement Options
Detail.Description: Help taxpayers set up payment plans based on balance owed

Sections.TemplateString:
📋 Agreement Types by Balance

BalanceTypeRequirements
< $10,000Guaranteed IAAuto-approved, 36 months
$10K - $25KStreamlined IADirect Debit required, 72 mo
$25K - $50KStreamlined IADirect Debit required, 72 mo
> $50,000Non-StreamlinedForm 433-F required

💵 Setup Fees (2024)

  • Online + Direct Debit: $22
  • Online + Other Payment: $69
  • Phone/Mail Setup: $178
  • Low Income: Fee waived/reduced

📝 Required Information

  • ☐ Monthly income and expenses
  • ☐ Bank account for Direct Debit
  • ☐ Preferred payment date (1-28)
  • ☐ All returns filed (compliance check)

🔗 Self-Service Portal

IRS Online Payment Agreement (OPA)

Encourage taxpayers to use OPA for lower fees!

Summary.Heading: 📄 Transcript Request
Summary.Description: Tax return, account, and wage transcripts

Detail.Heading: Transcript Types & Delivery
Detail.Description: Help taxpayers obtain tax records and transcripts

Sections.TemplateString:
📑 Transcript Types

TypeContainsUse For
Tax ReturnLine items from filed returnMortgage, loans
Tax AccountPayments, penalties, balancePayment history
Wage & IncomeW-2, 1099 dataVerify income
Record of AccountCombined return + accountComplete record
Verification (VoNF)Non-filer confirmationFAFSA, benefits

⏱️ Delivery Options

  • Online (IRS.gov): Instant access
  • By Mail: 5-10 business days
  • Form 4506-T: Fax request, 10 days
  • Form 4506: Full copy, $43 fee, 75 days

📅 Availability

  • Current year + 3 prior years (online)
  • Wage & Income: Current + 10 prior years
  • Older records: Form 4506 only

🔗 Self-Service Options

Get Transcript Online (IRS.gov)

Form 4506-T Instructions

Summary.Heading: 📬 Notice Explanation
Summary.Description: CP, LTR notice clarification and response deadlines

Detail.Heading: IRS Notice Guide
Detail.Description: Explain notices and guide taxpayers on required actions

Sections.TemplateString:
📋 Common CP Notices

NoticeMeaningResponse
CP14Balance DuePay or set up plan
CP2000Income MismatchAgree or dispute, 30 days
CP501-504Balance RemindersPay immediately
CP504Intent to LevyURGENT - 30 days
CP11/CP12Math ErrorReview changes
CP49Refund Applied to DebtInformational

⏰ Response Deadlines

  • CP2000: 30 days from notice date
  • CP504: 30 days before levy
  • 90-Day Letter: 90 days to petition Tax Court
  • Appeals: 30 days from adverse determination

🛡️ Taxpayer Rights

  • Right to representation
  • Right to appeal
  • Right to pay no more than correct amount
  • Innocent spouse relief (Form 8857)

Taxpayer Bill of Rights

Understanding Your IRS Notice (IRS.gov)
